description: Complete engineering component and subsystem ontology for military aircraft. Every subsystem is expanded to its lowest field-replaceable or engineering-meaningful unit.

Airframe.label: Airframe
Airframe.description: The primary structural skeleton of the aircraft. Everything that provides shape, loads paths, and structural integrity.

Fuselage.label: Fuselage
Fuselage.description: Main body structure housing crew, fuel, avionics, and payload.

NoseSection.label: Nose Section
NoseSection.description: Forward fuselage. Houses radar, FLIR sensors, and pitot-static probes.

RadomeFairing.label: Radome Fairing
RadomeFairing.description: RF-transparent nose cone protecting radar antenna.

PitotTube.label: Pitot Tube
PitotTube.description: Measures dynamic pressure for airspeed indication.

AngleOfAttackSensor.label: Angle of Attack Vane
AngleOfAttackSensor.description: Measures aircraft's angle of attack for flight control and stall warning.

SideslipSensor.label: Sideslip Sensor
SideslipSensor.description: Measures beta angle for flight envelope management.

NoseLandingGearBay.label: Nose Gear Bay
NoseLandingGearBay.description: Structural recess for retracted nose landing gear.

ForwardFuselage.label: Forward Fuselage
ForwardFuselage.description: Contains cockpit, ejection system, and forward avionics bays.

CockpitStructure.label: Cockpit Structural Shell
CockpitStructure.description: Pressure vessel and structural frame around crew station.

AvionicsBay.label: Forward Avionics Bay
AvionicsBay.description: Pressurized or cooled bay for forward mission electronics.

CenterFuselage.label: Center Fuselage
CenterFuselage.description: Structural core. Carries wing box carry-through structure, fuel cells, and main landing gear.

WingCarryThrough.label: Wing Carry-Through Box
WingCarryThrough.description: The central structural element that transfers wing bending loads through the fuselage.

FuelCells.label: Fuselage Fuel Cells
FuelCells.description: Internal wet-wing or bag fuel cells in fuselage.

MainGearBay.label: Main Gear Bay
MainGearBay.description: Retraction cavity for main landing gear.

InternalWeaponBay.label: Internal Weapon Bay
InternalWeaponBay.description: Enclosed bay for weapons carriage with reduced RCS.

AftFuselage.label: Aft Fuselage
AftFuselage.description: Rear fuselage section carrying engine exhausts, tail surfaces, and aft avionics.

EngineNacelleAft.label: Engine Nacelle (Aft)
EngineNacelleAft.description: Structural housing for turbine engines in aft fuselage.

TailBoom.label: Tail Boom
TailBoom.description: Extension carrying empennage on some designs.

EWAntennaBay.label: Aft EW Antenna Bay
EWAntennaBay.description: Houses tail radar warning receivers and EW sensors.

Wing.label: Wing Assembly
Wing.description: Primary lift-generating surface. Also carries fuel, weapon hardpoints, and control surfaces.

WingBox.label: Wing Box
WingBox.description: Primary load-bearing structure of the wing. Front and rear spars with upper and lower skin panels.

WingRoot.label: Wing Root
WingRoot.description: Junction between wing and fuselage. Maximum bending moment point.

WingTip.label: Wing Tip
WingTip.description: Outboard extremity. May carry AAM rails, EO pods, or winglets.

Winglet.label: Winglet
Winglet.description: Upturned wingtip devices reducing induced drag.

Slat.label: Leading Edge Slat
Slat.description: Deployable surface for increased lift at low speeds.

KruegerFlap.label: Krueger Flap
KruegerFlap.description: Leading edge droop flap on some designs.

LeadingEdgeExtension.label: Leading Edge Extension (LERX)
LeadingEdgeExtension.description: Vortex generating strake improving high-AoA performance.

Aileron.label: Aileron
Aileron.description: Roll control surface on outer trailing edge.

Spoiler.label: Spoiler / Speed Brake
Spoiler.description: Disrupts airflow to reduce lift and increase drag.

WingFuelTanks.label: Wing Fuel Tanks
WingFuelTanks.description: Integral wet wing or bladder fuel tanks within wing structure.

HardpointPylon.label: Hardpoint Pylon
HardpointPylon.description: Structural attachment point for external stores.

PyloStation.label: Pylon Station
PyloStation.description: Individual numbered weapon station on wing.

ConformalFuelTankAttachment.label: CFT Attachment
ConformalFuelTankAttachment.description: Structural points for conformal fuel tank integration.

VariableSweepMechanism.label: Variable Sweep Wing Mechanism
VariableSweepMechanism.description: Pivot and actuator system for variable geometry wings.

Empennage.label: Empennage (Tail Assembly)
Empennage.description: Tail group providing pitch, yaw, and roll stability and control.

Rudder.label: Rudder
Rudder.description: Movable surface on vertical stabilizer for yaw control.

VentralFin.label: Ventral Fin
VentralFin.description: Undersurface fin for enhanced directional stability at high AoA.

TwinVerticals.label: Twin Vertical Stabilizers
TwinVerticals.description: Dual-fin configuration for stability at high AoA. Common on high-performance fighters.

AllMovingStabilizer.label: All-Moving Stabilizer (Tailplane)
AllMovingStabilizer.description: Entire horizontal surface moves for pitch control. Also called stabilator.

Elevator.label: Elevator
Elevator.description: Hinged trailing edge surface on fixed tailplane for pitch control.

Canard.label: Canard Foreplane
Canard.description: Forward small wing providing additional pitch authority and vortex lift.

VTailConfiguration.label: V-Tail / Butterfly Tail
VTailConfiguration.description: Combined pitch and yaw control using V-shaped surfaces. Reduces wetted area.

TailBoomConfiguration.label: Twin Tail Boom
TailBoomConfiguration.description: Twin boom structure supporting empennage. Used on some twin-engine designs.

Cockpit.label: Cockpit
Cockpit.description: Crew station. Includes all pilot interfaces, displays, controls, and life support.

WindshieldPanel.label: Windshield
WindshieldPanel.description: Forward fixed transparency. Birdstrike and HUD layer.

CanopyJettisonSystem.label: Canopy Jettison System
CanopyJettisonSystem.description: Explosive cord or rocket-based canopy separation for ejection sequence.

HUDLayeredGlass.label: HUD Combiner Glass
HUDLayeredGlass.description: Optical combiner built into windshield for HUD projection.

RocketPack.label: Seat Rocket Pack
RocketPack.description: Solid propellant rocket for seat trajectory after ejection.

PersonalSurvivalKit.label: Personal Survival Kit
PersonalSurvivalKit.description: Emergency survival equipment attached to seat pan.

SeatRailGun.label: Catapult Rail Gun
SeatRailGun.description: Aircraft seat rail that accelerates seat before rocket ignition.

ZeroZeroCapability.label: Zero-Zero Capability
ZeroZeroCapability.description: Can eject safely at zero altitude and zero speed.

NeckRestraint.label: Neck Restraint System
NeckRestraint.description: Prevents cervical spine injury during ejection.

AntiGSuit.label: Anti-G Suit Port
AntiGSuit.description: Connectors for pilot G-suit inflation system.

HOTAS.label: HOTAS
HOTAS.description: Hands On Throttle And Stick. All combat-critical functions accessible without removing hands from primary controls.

Sidestick.label: Sidestick Controller
Sidestick.description: Side-mounted control column replacing center stick.

ThrottleLever.label: Throttle Lever(s)
ThrottleLever.description: Engine power control including afterburner detent.

RudderPedals.label: Rudder Pedals
RudderPedals.description: Foot controls for yaw/nose wheel steering.

LandingGear.label: Landing Gear System
LandingGear.description: Structural system supporting aircraft on ground and absorbing landing loads.

CatapultBar.label: Catapult Launch Bar
CatapultBar.description: Structural bar on NLG for carrier catapult attachment.

TailHook.label: Tail Hook
TailHook.description: Arresting hook for carrier deck or emergency field arrested landing.

EmergencyExtension.label: Emergency Gear Extension
EmergencyExtension.description: Gravity or pneumatic backup extension system.

ControlSurfaces.label: Flight Control Surfaces
ControlSurfaces.description: All movable aerodynamic surfaces for aircraft attitude control.

PropulsionSystem.label: Propulsion System
PropulsionSystem.description: All components that generate thrust and manage power output.

TurbojetEngine.label: Turbojet Engine
TurbojetEngine.description: Gas turbine engine exhausting all flow through propulsive nozzle. High specific thrust, lower efficiency.

Intake.label: Engine Air Intake
Intake.description: Decelerates and conditions airflow before compressor.

InletSeparator.label: Boundary Layer Diverter / SPIV
InletSeparator.description: Separates sluggish boundary layer from intake flow to compressor.

FanSection.label: Fan (Low-Pressure Compressor Stage 0)
FanSection.description: Large diameter first-stage blade row on turbofans.

LowPressureCompressor.label: Low Pressure Compressor (LPC)
LowPressureCompressor.description: Multi-stage axial compressor raising pressure moderately.

HighPressureCompressor.label: High Pressure Compressor (HPC)
HighPressureCompressor.description: Multi-stage compressor raising pressure to combustion levels.

Dilution_Zone.label: Dilution Zone
Dilution_Zone.description: Mixes cooling air to reduce turbine inlet temperature.

HighPressureTurbine.label: High Pressure Turbine (HPT)
HighPressureTurbine.description: Drives the HPC. Highest temperature section of engine.

LowPressureTurbine.label: Low Pressure Turbine (LPT)
LowPressureTurbine.description: Drives fan and LPC. Extracts remaining energy.

NozzleActuator.label: Nozzle Area Control Actuator
NozzleActuator.description: Adjusts throat area for optimal thrust at each flight condition.

DivergentFlap.label: Divergent Nozzle Flap
DivergentFlap.description: Expands exhaust below ambient pressure for additional thrust.

Afterburner.label: Afterburner / Reheat
Afterburner.description: Injects additional fuel into exhaust stream for temporary thrust augmentation.

FlameHolder.label: V-Gutter Flame Holder
FlameHolder.description: Stabilizes afterburner combustion at high airspeeds.

TurbofanEngine.label: Turbofan Engine
TurbofanEngine.description: Gas turbine with large bypass fan improving fuel efficiency at high subsonic and supersonic speeds.

MixerNozzle.label: Exhaust Mixer
MixerNozzle.description: Mixes core and bypass flow for noise reduction and efficiency.

FADEC.label: Full Authority Digital Engine Control
FADEC.description: Electronic controller managing all engine parameters.

TurbopropEngine.label: Turboprop Engine
TurbopropEngine.description: Gas turbine driving a propeller via reduction gearbox. Efficient at medium speeds (300-500 knots).

PropellerGearbox.label: Reduction Gearbox
PropellerGearbox.description: Reduces turbine speed (15000+ RPM) to propeller speed (1000-2000 RPM).

ConstantSpeedUnit.label: Constant Speed / Variable Pitch Unit
ConstantSpeedUnit.description: Maintains constant RPM by varying blade pitch.

FeatheringMechanism.label: Feathering Mechanism
FeatheringMechanism.description: Turns blades edge-on to airflow to minimize drag after engine failure.

ReverseThrust.label: Beta Range / Reverse Pitch
ReverseThrust.description: Negative pitch for ground roll deceleration.

TurboshaftEngine.label: Turboshaft Engine
TurboshaftEngine.description: Gas turbine optimized to deliver shaft power to rotor or other output shaft. Primary helicopter powerplant.

PowerTurbine.label: Free Power Turbine
PowerTurbine.description: Uncoupled turbine stage extracting shaft power output.

ParticleSeparator.label: Engine Inlet Particle Separator
ParticleSeparator.description: Centrifugal separator removing sand and debris from inlet air.

Ramjet.label: Ramjet
Ramjet.description: Air-breathing jet without rotating machinery. Requires supersonic inlet flow. Cannot operate from standstill.

Scramjet.label: Scramjet (Supersonic Combustion Ramjet)
Scramjet.description: Air-breathing engine where combustion occurs at supersonic flow velocities. Operates above Mach 5.

VariableCycleEngine.label: Variable Cycle Engine (VCE)
VariableCycleEngine.description: Engine that can change bypass ratio in flight to optimize efficiency at subsonic cruise and supersonic dash.
VariableCycleEngine.description_extended: Critical for 6th generation aircraft. Can operate as turbofan at subsonic, shift to low-bypass turbojet for supersonic.

ElectricPropulsion.label: Electric Propulsion
ElectricPropulsion.description: Motor-driven propeller using electrical power from batteries, fuel cells, or generators.

ThrustVectoring.label: Thrust Vectoring System
ThrustVectoring.description: Deflects engine exhaust to provide pitch, yaw, and roll control authority beyond aerodynamic surfaces.

TwoDimensional.label: 2D Thrust Vectoring
TwoDimensional.description: Pitch axis only. Used on F-22.

ThreeDimensional.label: 3D Thrust Vectoring
ThreeDimensional.description: Pitch and yaw axes. KNVK (full 3D) as on Su-35S, Su-57.

Swiveling_Nozzle.label: Swiveling Nozzle (STOVL)
Swiveling_Nozzle.description: Rotates full nozzle for VTOL thrust. F-35B.

PaddleDeflector.label: Paddle / Petal Deflector
PaddleDeflector.description: Jet deflector paddles at nozzle exit.

FuelSystem.label: Fuel System
FuelSystem.description: Complete aircraft fuel storage, transfer, and management.

IntegralWetWing.label: Integral Wet Wing Tank
IntegralWetWing.description: Wing structure sealed to form tank directly.

BladderBag.label: Bladder / Bag Fuel Cell
BladderBag.description: Flexible sealed bags within structural bays.

ConformalFuelTank.label: Conformal Fuel Tank (CFT)
ConformalFuelTank.description: External tanks that conform to aircraft shape, reducing drag vs standard tanks.

ExternalDropTank.label: External Drop Tank
ExternalDropTank.description: Jettisable external fuel tank on pylons.

BoostPumps.label: Tank Boost Pumps
BoostPumps.description: Electrically driven pumps pressurizing fuel to engine.

CrossfeedValves.label: Crossfeed Valves
CrossfeedValves.description: Allow transfer between tanks and to either engine.

JettisonSystem.label: Fuel Dump / Jettison System
JettisonSystem.description: Emergency rapid fuel dumping to reduce landing weight.

BoomReceptacle.label: Boom Receptacle
BoomReceptacle.description: Dorsal receptacle that accepts boom nozzle.

FuelManagementComputer.label: Fuel Management Computer
FuelManagementComputer.description: Manages transfer sequencing, CG control, and fuel remaining calculations.

InertGasSystem.label: Inert Gas / OBIGGS
InertGasSystem.description: On-Board Inert Gas Generation System. Fills tank ullage with nitrogen to prevent explosion.

HydraulicSystem.label: Hydraulic System
HydraulicSystem.description: High-pressure fluid power for flight controls, landing gear, brakes, and weapon bay doors.

ElectricBackupPump.label: Electric Backup Hydraulic Pump
ElectricBackupPump.description: Powers hydraulics when engine-driven pumps unavailable.

RAT.label: Ram Air Turbine (RAT)
RAT.description: Emergency hydraulic/electric power from airstream in total power loss.

PressureAccumulator.label: Pressure Accumulator
PressureAccumulator.description: Stores pressurized fluid for immediate demand response.

ElectricalSystem.label: Electrical Power System
ElectricalSystem.description: Generation, distribution, and management of electrical power throughout aircraft.

APU.label: Auxiliary Power Unit
APU.description: Small gas turbine providing electrical and bleed air power on ground and as backup.

GeneratorControlUnit.label: Generator Control Unit (GCU)
GeneratorControlUnit.description: Controls generator output voltage, frequency, and load sharing.

DCPowerConverter.label: DC Power Converter / TRU
DCPowerConverter.description: Transforms AC to DC for avionics and equipment.

EnvironmentalControlSystem.label: Environmental Control System (ECS)
EnvironmentalControlSystem.description: Manages cockpit and avionics bay temperature, pressurization, and oxygen.

EngineBleedAir.label: Engine Bleed Air System
EngineBleedAir.description: Taps compressed air from compressor for ECS.

AirCycleUnit.label: Air Cycle Machine / Pack
AirCycleUnit.description: Bootstrap cycle machine cooling bleed air.

OBOGS.label: On-Board Oxygen Generation System
OBOGS.description: Molecular sieve generates oxygen from bleed air. No bottled oxygen needed.

LOX.label: Liquid Oxygen System
LOX.description: Cryogenic oxygen converted to gaseous for crew breathing.

AvionicsCooling.label: Avionics Liquid Cooling System
AvionicsCooling.description: Circulates coolant through avionics bays for thermal management.

EngineFireDetector.label: Engine Fire Detection Loop
EngineFireDetector.description: Pneumatic or electrolytic continuous loop sensor around engine nacelle.

FireExtinguisher.label: HRD Fire Extinguisher Bottle
FireExtinguisher.description: High Rate Discharge bottle delivering suppressant to engine bay.

PyroFireHandles.label: Fire Handle / T-Handle
PyroFireHandles.description: Crew-operated handle to shut down engine and discharge suppressant.

AntiGGarment.label: Anti-G Suit (ATAGS / CSU-13B)
AntiGGarment.description: Pneumatically inflates to restrict blood pooling in lower body during high-G maneuvers.

HMD.label: Helmet Mounted Display / Sight
HMD.description: Symbology and targeting cues projected onto visor.

EmergencyLocator.label: Emergency Locator Transmitter (ELT / PLB)
EmergencyLocator.description: Activates automatically on ejection for rescue services.

WeaponStation.label: Weapon Stations
WeaponStation.description: All hardpoints, bays, and mounting systems for weapons and stores.

WeaponEjector.label: Pneumatic / Explosive Weapon Ejector
WeaponEjector.description: Forces weapon clear of bay before motor ignition.

CarouselLauncher.label: Rotary Weapon Carousel
CarouselLauncher.description: Rotating launcher for multiple weapons in a single bay.

GunGasVenting.label: Gun Gas Venting System
GunGasVenting.description: Prevents gun gases from entering engine intake.
